# Evaluation figures (generated by `tools/eval_report.py`)

> Reproducible — re-run to regenerate. Headline detection/latency/abs-false-positive are **L4 bench**, not these sim figures (11 §11.2). Status column says which is which.


## 1. Scenario outcomes (L3, S1-S6 + faults)

| scn | TC | finals | reached DANGER | worst | audio | standby |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| S1 | TC-S1 | {"FRONT_RIGHT": "DANGER"} | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_RIGHT | DANGER | False |
| S2 | TC-S2 | {"RIGHT": "DANGER"} | RIGHT | RIGHT | DANGER | False |
| S3 | TC-S3 | {"LEFT": "DANGER"} | LEFT | LEFT | DANGER | False |
| S4 | TC-S4 | {"REAR": "DANGER"} | REAR | REAR | DANGER | False |
| S5 | TC-S5 | {"LEFT": "CAUTION", "REAR": "CAUTION", "RIGHT": "DANGER"} | RIGHT | RIGHT | DANGER | False |
| S6 | TC-S6 | {"LEFT": "DANGER"} | LEFT | LEFT | SILENT | True |
| F1 | TC-F1 | {"RIGHT": "UNKNOWN"} | RIGHT | — | SILENT | False |
| F2 | TC-F2 | {"RIGHT": "DANGER"} | RIGHT | RIGHT | DANGER | False |
| F3·pedestrian | TC-F3 | {"RIGHT": "DANGER"} | RIGHT | RIGHT | DANGER | False |
| F3·vehicle | TC-F3 | {"RIGHT": "CAUTION"} | — | RIGHT | CAUTION | False |


## 2. Indicative danger-path latency (sim, S1-S6)

| scn | zone | sim ms | est-real ms (+70) |
|---|---|---|---|
| S1 | FRONT_RIGHT | 100 | 170 |
| S2 | RIGHT | n/a | n/a |
| S3 | LEFT | n/a | n/a |
| S4 | REAR | n/a | n/a |
| S5 | LEFT | n/a | n/a |
| S5 | REAR | n/a | n/a |
| S5 | RIGHT | n/a | n/a |
| S6 | LEFT | n/a | n/a |


_n=1 clean approach crossing(s) · min 100 · p50 100.0 · p95 100.0 · max 100 ms (sim) → est-real p95 ~170.0 ms; NFR-01 danger-path ≤ 200 ms. Only un-boosted approaches yield a latency (context-boosted S2–S6 warn before the crossing), so n is small by construction — indicative, not a distribution and not headline._


## 3. Ultrasonic group-fire rate (TC-F5, ADR-0007)

| sensor_id | zone | fire_group | fires/ticks | ≈ Hz |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| front_center | FRONT | 0 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| left_mid | LEFT | 0 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| rear_center | REAR | 0 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| right_mid | RIGHT | 0 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| front_left | FRONT_LEFT | 1 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| front_right | FRONT_RIGHT | 1 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| rear_left | REAR_LEFT | 1 | 10/20 | 5.0 |
| rear_right | REAR_RIGHT | 1 | 10/20 | 5.0 |


_Two non-adjacent groups alternate → each sensor ~½ the 10 Hz master ≈ 5 Hz._


## 4. Canonical-run replay metrics (logs/events.jsonl → summarize_events)

_Across the full scenario battery: **109** transitions over **8** zones · to-DANGER **9** · to-UNKNOWN **29** · flicker **0**._


| zone | transitions | to-DANGER | to-UNKNOWN | flicker |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FRONT | 9 | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| FRONT_LEFT | 16 | 0 | 7 | 0 |
| FRONT_RIGHT | 18 | 1 | 7 | 0 |
| LEFT | 11 | 2 | 0 | 0 |
| REAR | 10 | 1 | 0 | 0 |
| REAR_LEFT | 16 | 0 | 7 | 0 |
| REAR_RIGHT | 16 | 0 | 7 | 0 |
| RIGHT | 13 | 5 | 1 | 0 |


## 5. Metric vs target (11 §11.3) — with honest status

| metric | target | evidence now (sim/regression) | status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Detection rate | ≥ 95% | L3: every S1-S6 object reaches the correct zone severity; but the sim derives detection from geometry (measures the model against itself) | regression-only · NEEDS-L4 (headline) |
| End-to-end latency (danger-path) | ≤ 200 ms (stretch ≤ 150) | indicative sim p50 100.0 / p95 100.0 ms → est-real p95 ~170.0 ms (+~70 ms physical path, doc 19); single-observer tool exists (latency_observer.py) | met-in-sim (indicative) · NEEDS-L4 (headline) |
| False-positive rate | ≤ a tuned threshold (low enough to keep on) | nuisance sweep characterizes dwell/episodes/flicker; operating point validated at the knee (doc 19). Absolute rate needs real clutter/multipath | regression-only · NEEDS-L4 (absolute rate) |
| Zone-localization accuracy | ≥ 98% | L3: every alert lands in the config-mapped zone (FR-02/03); sensor→zone is central config, not geometry-derived | met-in-sim · NEEDS-L4 (real cones) |
| Glance-time to locate | ≤ 1 s in ≥ 95% | HMI glanceability designed (06); not measured in sim | NEEDS-L5 (usability review) |
| Flicker | ≈ 0 (debounce holds) | canonical run: 0 flicker event(s) across 109 transitions / all scenarios; F2 boundary jitter ≤ 3 transitions; sweep flicker 0 at the chosen point (doc 19) | met-in-sim |
| Fault visibility (UNKNOWN, never SAFE) | 100% | TC-F1: RIGHT ages to UNKNOWN after unplug (never stale-green). Of the 29 to-UNKNOWN transitions, most are the NFR-12 boot warming-up (a zone starts UNKNOWN until its first reading, not fake SAFE — see per-zone table); the fault-driven one is RIGHT | met-in-sim |
| Compute liveness (freeze → UNKNOWN) | 100% within freshness window | TC-F4: HMI liveness clock + fusion LWT/heartbeat → SIGNAL LOST on kill (HMI unit tests + live demo, 17 §5) | met-in-sim (demo) · NEEDS-L4 (bench boot) |
| Refresh rate | HMI ≥ 10 Hz; ultrasonic ~5 Hz/sensor | HMI rAF loop ≥ 10 Hz (S3); group-fire gives [5.0] Hz/sensor in sim (~½ master, ADR-0007) | met-in-sim · NEEDS-L4 (real Hz on HW) |
| Recovery (auto-restart) | < 5 s | compose restart policy + HMI auto-recovers to MONITORING on fusion return | regression-only · NEEDS-L4 (timed on HW) |


## 6. Test-case coverage (11 §11.4)

| TC | scenario | proven where | status |
|---|---|---|---|
| TC-S1 | pull-away FRONT_RIGHT | L3 test_TC_S1 + shim [S1] | met-in-sim |
| TC-S2 | right-turn squeeze | L3 test_TC_S2 + shim + broker job | met-in-sim |
| TC-S3 | left lane change | L3 test_TC_S3 + shim [S3] | met-in-sim |
| TC-S4 | reversing | L3 test_TC_S4 + shim + broker job | met-in-sim |
| TC-S5 | dense crawl (worst wins) | L3 test_TC_S5 + shim [S5] | met-in-sim |
| TC-S6 | parked standby (audio silent) | L3 test_TC_S6 + shim [S6] | met-in-sim |
| TC-F1 | sensor unplugged → UNKNOWN | L3 test_TC_F1 + shim | met-in-sim |
| TC-F2 | boundary jitter (debounce holds) | L3 test_TC_F2 + shim finals | met-in-sim |
| TC-F3 | VRU vs vehicle (phase-2 cam) | L3 test_TC_F3 (both) + shim | regression-only (phase-2) |
| TC-F4 | compute freeze → SIGNAL LOST | HMI unit tests + live kill demo (17 §5) | met-in-sim (demo) · NEEDS-L4 |
| TC-F5 | group-fire ~½ rate/sensor | L3 test_TC_F5 + shim counts | met-in-sim · NEEDS-L4 (real Hz) |
